title: COAL MINING JOBS DOWN 24% UNDER TRUMP — BLS DATA
title_alt: 50+ COAL PLANTS CLOSED DURING THE TRUMP TERM
description:
The 2016 trail promise to West Virginia, Pennsylvania, and Ohio: bring back coal. The Bureau of Labor Statistics receipt: coal mining jobs January 2017 = 50,300 → January 2021 = 38,400. Down 24%.

The EIA plant retirement database: more than 50 coal-fired power plants closed during the same term. Rhetoric kept the promise. The spreadsheet did not.

Full 145-promise audit: https://sealed2016.com?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=shorts&utm_campaign=coal

#politics #coal #energy #trump #shorts #factcheck
